name: sux
description: Installs the one sux MCP connector (/mcp) AND both skills — the `sux` intent→tool routing skill and the `life` memory skill — behind a single OAuth-gated front door. Universal tools (web search, fetch/render, research, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch) plus `recall` and the `fn` escape hatch; the `life` skill turns them into a second brain (capture, remember, recall with citations, triage, consolidate). Personal namespaces live behind separate /<domain>/mcp connectors (`vault_`/`mail_`/`files_`/`cal_`/`contact_` verbs) — reachable and OAuth-authorized, hidden from the default discovery manifest.
